signals.headline: HEADLINE:** US and Iran exchange nuclear suspension proposals; positions remain far apart | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
HEADLINE:** US and Iran exchange nuclear suspension proposals; positions remain far apart | YES | HIGH confidence

The US proposed a 20-year suspension of Iranian nuclear enrichment, while Iran countered with a five-year proposal.[5] Trump rejected the 20-year framework, insisting Iran cannot possess nuclear weapons without accepting permanent enrichment restrictions.[1]

While the ceasefire technically holds, diplomatic efforts have stalled with Vice President Vance stating "we have not reached an agreement" after 21 hours of substantive discussions in Islamabad.[3]
